articles.headline: Proxima Fusion Raises €411 Million for AI-Driven Nuclear Energy, Backed by Google and RWE
articles.summary: Munich-based Proxima Fusion secured €411 million ($469M) in funding from Alphabet's Google and German utility RWE to advance nuclear energy for AI data centers. This investment signals a major shift in securing stable, clean power infrastructure for growing AI operations, directly impacting long-term energy costs and grid reliability for corporations.

articles.headline: HCLTech bags $1.14 billion AI workplace transformation deal
articles.summary: HCLTech secured a historic $1.14 billion strategic engagement with a European Fortune Global 50 enterprise, likely Mercedes-Benz, covering AI-powered digital workplace services and infrastructure. This major deal signals increased corporate investment in AI-led enterprise modernization and managed services, impacting workforce planning and cloud costs for large businesses.

articles.headline: ESDS unveils Swaraj Cloud for sovereign AI workloads
articles.summary: Cloud infrastructure provider launched Swaraj Cloud to address data sovereignty, compliance, and AI computing needs using Indian infrastructure. This development is vital for businesses in regulated industries seeking secure, locally hosted cloud solutions, impacting global trade compliance and supply chain data strategies.
